examples: As a result, landholding is fragmented.
Their opposition to communal landholding was motivated by the obstacles this form of tenure placed in the way of acquiring land for the Jewish National Home.
Stepping into agricultural stage, people settle down in village form and the lands are divided into different patches whose landholding right belongs to different village groups.
Landholding is almost as unequal as in colonial times: 1% of farms have half the usable land.
The surrounding families had an average landholding of 4 to 5 acres, with half a dozen relatives sharing the title.
